title: Group with status
excerpt: Is there a solution to integrate a status for a group ? The goal is to create a progress summary view to bypass the portfolio project proposed by Monday.com.

posts.author: Abricoo (M.CH)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a solution to integrate a status for a group ? The goal is to create a progress summary view to bypass the portfolio project proposed by Monday.com.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Abricoo

Many users have groups that are paired with the labels of a status column then use automations to automatically move items to the corresponding group when the status changes.

If that doesn’t answer your question, can you be more explicit about the end goal you want to achieve?

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: Abricoo (M.CH)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JCorrell,

Thank you for your feedback, however this does not answer my question.

You can see the structure of our projects (one group = one project)

Capture d'écran 2024-10-29 1238321327×242 54.8 KB

The objective is to create a summary view like the project portfolio model.

Capture d'écran 2024-10-29 1233471549×242 27.4 KB

posts.author: Ag47Panda (Steve Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml: You can either use a dashboard to compile and display groups as a whole or use a custom view with a widget of the same data on the current board.

posts.author: Abricoo (M.CH)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Steve for your feedback. Unfortunately this proposal has already been tested and does not meet demand. The goal would be to have fields dedicated to the group.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Abricoo If an add-on is an option, I suggest taking a look at Analytics & Reports by Screenful. With Screenful, you can create custom progress reports, including progress reports for groups. Here’s an example chart:

CleanShot 2024-11-18 at 15.22.371235×601 123 KB

You can select any item property to be a row in that table, in your case it would be group. The columns are also configurable. Here’s a guide that explains the whole process.

You can get started with a 14 days trial to give it a try.
